conflictive.thread_title: Regulation of AI systems in the EU
conflictive.thread_body: The EU AI Act classifies AI systems by risk level. Do you think this approach is effective? What are its limitations?

thread_comments.author: Frank
thread_comments.body: The EU AI Act is just bureaucratic overreach. It will kill innovation in Europe while the US and China move ahead without these ridiculous constraints.

thread_comments.author: Grace
thread_comments.body: That's a really superficial take, Frank. Maybe if you actually read the Act instead of parroting tech bro talking points, you'd know that most AI systems fall under minimal risk and aren't affected at all.

thread_comments.author: Frank
thread_comments.body: Oh please, spare me the lecture. People who've never built anything always love to regulate. This is exactly what's wrong with academia.
